mapper.select: SELECT l.id AS levelId, l.name AS levelName, COUNT(ulp.user_id) AS attemptCount, SUM(ulp.passed) AS passCount, IF(COUNT(ulp.user_id)>0, ROUND(SUM(ulp.passed)*100.0/COUNT(ulp.user_id),2), 0) AS passRate FROM levels l LEFT JOIN user_level_progress ulp ON l.id = ulp.level_id WHERE l.grade_id = #{gradeId} GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY l.sort_order, l.id

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.real_name AS realName, u.username, COUNT(a.id) AS attemptCount, COALESCE(SUM(a.time_spent),0) AS totalTimeSpent FROM users u LEFT JOIN attempts a ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.role_id = 1 AND u.class_id = #{classId} GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY attemptCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT q.id AS questionId, LEFT(q.content, 50) AS contentBrief, COUNT(wq.user_id) AS wrongCount FROM wrong_questions wq JOIN questions q ON wq.question_id = q.id WHERE q.grade_id = #{gradeId} WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY q.id, q.content ORDER BY wrongCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ukp.kp_id AS kpId, kp.name AS kpName, u.id AS userId, u.real_name AS realName, COALESCE(ukp.mastery_score, 0) AS masteryScore FROM users u CROSS JOIN knowledge_points kp LEFT JOIN user_kp_mastery ukp ON ukp.user_id = u.id AND ukp.kp_id = kp.id WHERE u.role_id = 1 AND u.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY u.id, kp.id
